overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in traditional red robes exploring a rocky coastal environment at night. The character walks from a sandy path into shallow tidal pools, navigates through a narrow rocky canyon, and emerges to an open shoreline with a massive cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal path approaching rocky tide pools

events.description: character steps from sandy ground into shallow water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the rocky pools and wooden structures ahead

entered.detail: wooden fortification structure with warm lights visible on the left hillside
tall wooden poles with hanging banners strung between them
large layered rock formation rising from the coastal ground
shallow tidal pool with visible seaweed and rocky bottom

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sandy coastal path at night, approaching a rocky area with tidal pools. Wooden scaffolding with lights is visible on the left hillside, and prayer flags stand ahead against the dark blue sky. The character steps into the shallow water around the 8-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow tidal pools between rock formations

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through waist-deep water among the rocky outcrops

entered.detail: natural rock archway visible in the distance between formations

segments.scene_description: The character wades through shallow tidal pools surrounded by rocky outcrops. The water is clear with visible seaweed on the bottom. Prayer flags remain visible in the distance, and a stone arch formation becomes visible ahead as the character moves deeper into the rocky coastal area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon entrance with stone arch

events.description: character climbs out of water onto rocky gravel ground
character enters narrow rocky canyon passage

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water onto rocky ground and approaching a narrow canyon entrance

entered.detail: tall rocky canyon walls creating a narrow passage
tall rocky canyon walls creating a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character exits the water onto a gravelly rocky surface and approaches a stone arch formation. The scene transitions into a narrow canyon with tall rock walls on both sides, blocking much of the sky and creating a darker, enclosed environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon leading to open coast

events.description: character exits the narrow canyon to open coastal view with ocean visible

agents.ego_description: traversing the narrow rocky passage and emerging to the open shoreline

entered.detail: open ocean visible in the distance beyond the rocky coast
jagged rock formations along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the narrow canyon passage, with tall rock walls enclosing the path. Around the 48-second mark, the canyon opens up to reveal a wide coastal view with the ocean visible in the distance. The lighting brightens as the sky becomes visible again.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky coastline with massive cliff face

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shore toward the towering cliff face on the left

entered.detail: massive towering cliff with layered rock strata dominating the left side
large animal bones scattered on the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The character emerges fully into an open rocky coastal area with a massive cliff face towering on the left. The ocean is visible to the right, and large animal skeleton remains are scattered on the ground. The character continues walking toward the imposing cliff formation as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sandy coastal path into a series of shallow, rocky tidal pools under a dark blue night sky. It begins with the character walking along the shore past illuminated wooden scaffolding on a hillside and prayer flags standing ahead. As the character advances, the terrain shifts from dry sand to clear, shallow water where seaweed is visible on the seabed. The scene then expands as the character wades deeper into the coastal area, moving past rocky outcrops while the distant prayer flags remain in view. Finally, the camera follows the character toward a stone arch formation that emerges from the surrounding rocks.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into a vast, open coastal landscape. It begins with the character exiting the water onto a gravelly surface and passing under a stone arch, which leads directly into a narrow canyon with towering walls that block the sky and darken the environment. As the character navigates this enclosed passage, the walls gradually recede and the lighting brightens, revealing a wide vista of the distant ocean. The scene then expands fully into a rocky shoreline where the horizon opens up to the right and a massive cliff face looms on the left. Finally, the camera follows the character past scattered animal skeletons as they walk toward the imposing cliff formation.
